hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const p=JSON.parse(d);console.log(p.tool_input&&p.tool_input.file_path||'');})" <<< "$INPUT"); if [[ "$FILE" == *"MeuPortifolio"* ]]; then cd "c:/Gustavo_Betone/MeuPortifolio" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "update: $(basename \"$FILE\")" && git push origin main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
